lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX loadout, hardpoint sizes and power/capacitor budget on the small frame.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Mamba ship page — manufacturer specs, top-speed figure, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout and module-variant data — confirms the 1H/2L/2S hardpoints, six optional internals and absence of military slots behind the AX hardening plan.

sources.label: Inara — Mamba
sources.what: Ship overview: base stats, internals layout, hardpoints, price, and confirmation of no rank or permit gate.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Mamba hull profile and speed/agility notes, cross-referenced against AX weapon class limits (Gauss is small-class; no huge AX gun).
